patch.value: Lane E: Docs audit (progressive disclosure, minimal README, link graph, duplicated docs/skills)

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Docs audit started: inventorying docs, link graph, freshness cross-checks.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Milestone: link graph built over 83 md files (root+docs+packages+plugins+.agents/skills). 0 broken relative links. Orphans from README: AGENTS.md, PRD.md, .agents/skills/*, 9/11 package READMEs. Stale found: README.md:66 claims 26 MCP tools (actual 28). 3 parallel freshness audits running (COMMANDS, SDK/EXTENSIONS, remaining docs).

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Milestone: COMMANDS.md audit done (1 MED: normalize listed without package caveat; 3 LOW: five-vs-six statuses, comments-audit/test-runs missing package footnote, completion section missing optional note). Plugin surface stale in 4 places: README.md:66, plugins/pm-claude/README.md:9/32/40 + plugin.json description all say 26 MCP tools (actual 28); plugin README narrow-tool table missing pm_next/pm_focus/pm_profile. CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN.md:58/116 already correct at 28.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Milestone: SDK/EXTENSIONS audit done. Clean on SCAFFOLD_CAPABILITIES(10), package list(11 incl pm-kanban), SDK export claims (0 nonexistent). Findings: plugins/pm-claude/README.md 26-vs-28 tools + missing pm_next/pm_profile rows (HIGH); EXTENSIONS.md:89 vs SDK.md:573-620 duplicate 10-capability matrix (MED); starter-extension README uses legacy 'pm extension --install/--doctor' vocabulary (LOW). Awaiting final audit lane (QUICKSTART/CONFIG/ARCH/plugin docs).

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Audit complete. Totals: 0 broken links across 83 md files; 6 HIGH (26-vs-28 MCP tools in README.md:66 + plugins/pm-claude/README.md x3 + plugin.json; Node-20 claims in ONBOARDING:17, ARCHITECTURE:17, CONTRIBUTING:7; stale CI matrix CONTRIBUTING:178), 4 MED (package-only cmds shown as core in AGENT_GUIDE/ONBOARDING/CONFIGURATION/ARCHITECTURE + COMMANDS.md normalize; canonical-loop tripled in AGENT_GUIDE/ONBOARDING/QUICKSTART; capability matrix duplicated EXTENSIONS.md:89 vs SDK.md:573-620), ~8 LOW. Orphans: AGENTS.md, PRD.md, 9/11 package READMEs. Full structured findings + target doc tree returned to coordinator.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Lane E COMPLETE: 0 broken links; 6 HIGH stale claims (26->28 MCP tools x3 sites, Node 20->22.18 x3), 4 MED duplication/omission clusters, 10 LOW nits. Fixes being applied on branch docs-freshness-and-ci-hardening.

patch.value: Docs audit complete and fixes applied on branch docs-freshness-and-ci-hardening: 26->28 MCP tools (README, plugin README x3, plugin.json), Node 20->22.18 (CONTRIBUTING/ARCHITECTURE/ONBOARDING), stale CI matrix, package-only command caveats (COMMANDS/AGENT_GUIDE/ONBOARDING/CONFIGURATION/ARCHITECTURE), EXTENSIONS-vs-SDK capability-matrix dedupe, canonical-loop pointer, starter-extension package-first vocabulary, six-statuses wording, completion/guide-shell note, orphan links (AGENTS.md, PRD.md, 11 package READMEs).
